full_prompt: Design a 1U CubeSat chassis per the 2014 open-CAD platform CubeSat Challenge brief, which explicitly references Cal Poly CDS Rev 14.1 (1U envelope, 1.33 kg/U mass limit, rail specs). The challenge asks for a 1U primary structure that houses a PC/104 PCB stack and that can be qualified to typical launch-vehicle ICD loads. Envelope: 100 x 100 x 113.5 mm outer; 4 longitudinal rails 8.5 x 8.5 mm protruding 6.5 mm above +Z / -Z faces; 4 M3 standoff holes on 93 x 82.5 mm rectangular pattern for PC/104 stack. Rail straightness <= 0.1 mm, rail Ra <= 1.6 um, hard-anodized per MIL-A-8625 Type III. Total 1U mass cap (structure + payload) <= 1.33 kg (per 14.1 updated value) or 2.0 kg depending on revision; use 1.33 kg here. Structure-only mass <= 150 g. Material: 7075-T6 aluminum hard anodized (E = 71.7 GPa, yield 503 MPa, ultimate 572 MPa, density 2810 kg/m^3). Load cases (launch qualification): (R1) 20 g quasi-static in each of three orthogonal axes with lumped 1.33 kg at CM; max von Mises <= yield / 1.25 = 402 MPa. (R2) Modal first frequency hard-mounted at rail contact >= 100 Hz. (R3) Random vibration 14.1 Grms 20-2000 Hz with 3-sigma margin; max von Mises <= 402 MPa. (R4) Mass <= 150 g. (R5) CM offset from geometric center <= 20 mm each axis. (R6) Post-test dimensional envelope retention per CDS 14.1. Primary verification: structural FEA (linear static x3) + modal + random vibration PSD. Vibration secondary. Thermal, fluid, radiation NOT required. Deliverables: STEP AP242 + Parasolid, and a report listing structure mass in g, CM offset in mm, first 3 modal frequencies, max stress in quasi-static and random cases.
short_prompt:
Design a 1U CubeSat primary structure per the 2014 open-CAD platform CubeSat Challenge, referencing Cal Poly CDS Rev 14.1. Four longitudinal rails 8.5 x 8.5 mm protrude >= 6.5 mm above the +Z / -Z faces; rail straightness <= 0.1 mm, Ra <= 1.6 um, hard-anodized per MIL-A-8625 Type III. Internal PC/104 stack mounts on 4 M3 standoffs on a 93 x 82.5 mm rectangular pattern. Total 1U mass (structure + payload) <= 1.33 kg per CDS 14.1; CM offset <= 20 mm per axis; post-test dimensional envelope retention per CDS 14.1.

Envelope: outer 100 x 100 x 113.5 mm.

Load cases (launch qualification).
- LC1 quasi-static 20 g in each of three orthogonal axes on the 1.33 kg lumped CM.
- LC2 modal: hard-mounted at rail contact, first frequency >= 100 Hz.
- LC3 random vibration: 14.1 Grms over 20-2000 Hz with 3-sigma margin.

prompt.title: open-CAD platform CubeSat 1U chassis
prompt.brief: 1U chassis per Cal Poly CDS 14.1, hard-anodized 7075-T6, passes 20 g quasi-static + 14.1 Grms.

boundary_conditions.applied_mass: lumped 1.33 kg at CM coupled to stack holes
